query: Discover a new feature: 'add Bruno API test collection support to the verify recipe'. Assess scope, produce problem statement and user stories.
expected_skill_contribution: The discover recipe should auto-size the feature (Micro/Small/Medium), emit the First Visible Output with scope declaration, produce a structured discovery.md or inline problem statement, and create a Beads epic.
fixture_intent: Validates that discover correctly auto-sizes, produces a problem statement with user stories rather than jumping to implementation, and creates a Beads epic with --issue_type epic.
baseline_gaps: jumps to implementation or recipe YAML without a problem statement first
skips auto-sizing — treats all features as the same complexity
produces no Beads epic and no user stories in the output
expected_behavior: emits a First Visible Output block declaring scope (Micro/Small/Medium/Large) before any tool call
produces a problem statement covering: problem, users affected, success metrics
generates at least one user story in 'As a <role>, I want <capability> so that <benefit>' format
creates a Beads epic with `bd create --issue_type epic` and reports the epic ID

query: Discover the requirements for a 'parallel skill eval runner' feature. Run the 9-dimension implicit-requirement sweep and produce the discovery document.
expected_skill_contribution: The discover recipe should load the sdd skill, run bd prime, perform the 9-dimension sweep for a complex (Large) feature, delegate to product-owner, and produce a spec-ready discovery document.
fixture_intent: A complex feature with multiple implicit dimensions (concurrency, error handling, observability); the agent must identify it as Large scope and run the full 9-dimension sweep before producing the discovery artifact.
baseline_gaps: classifies the feature as Small or Medium without justifying Large scope
skips the 9-dimension implicit-requirement sweep or marks all dimensions N/A without reasoning
produces a discovery document without bd prime orientation first
expected_behavior: classifies the feature as Large or Complex and justifies the classification
runs `bd prime` as the first tool call before any file reads
runs the 9-dimension sweep and resolves at least 5 dimensions with a decision or explicit N/A reason
produces a discovery document at `.specs/features/parallel-eval-runner/discovery.md` or equivalent

query: Discover requirements for splitting the 'verify' recipe into type-specific sub-workflows. Identify ambiguities, run the implicit-requirement sweep, and produce a Beads epic with dependency-ordered stories.
expected_skill_contribution: The discover recipe must handle a complex brownfield refactoring: orient with bd prime, identify it as Large/Complex, delegate ux-researcher for UX impact, run the 9-dimension sweep, produce discovery.md, and create ordered Beads stories with dependencies.
fixture_intent: A complex brownfield refactoring with backward-compatibility risk; the agent must identify gray areas (idempotency of split, migration risk) and represent them in the discovery document before proposing a Beads epic structure.
baseline_gaps: treats this as Small scope without analyzing backward-compatibility risk
proposes implementation tasks instead of discovery stories at the epic level
creates no Beads epic or produces no `bd create --issue_type epic` command
expected_behavior: classifies as Large or Complex and identifies backward-compatibility as a gray area
runs `bd prime` first and checks for existing related issues before creating new ones
resolves at least 3 of the 9 implicit dimensions with non-N/A answers
creates a Beads epic and at least 2 ordered story beads using `--deps partOf:<epic-id>`
